headline: Newmont’s 2025 ESG Reports Inform Safety And Valuation Considerations
summary: Newmont (NYSE:NEM) released its 2025 Sustainability Report, outlining its environmental, social, and governance initiatives across its global mining portfolio. The company also published its 2025 Taxes & Royalties Contribution Report, detailing economic contributions and community investments to host countries and regions. Newmont highlighted progress under its "Always Safe" program, reporting a recent safety incident alongside the achievement of zero fatalities in 2025. As one of the...
